summary: Ported Cam's OSAlloc and OSArena work, replacing matched allocator and arena assembly with C while preserving remaining unmatched OSAlloc assembly. The PR added Dolphin OS allocator/arena/time headers, introduced real names for arena allocation and current-heap functions, and adjusted build ordering and asm references so the new C objects fit the existing binary layout.
what_changed: Removed the matched front portion of asm/dolphin/os/OSAlloc.s: DLInsert, OSAllocFromHeap, OSFreeToHeap, and func_80344068, while leaving OSInitAlloc and later OSAlloc assembly in place.
Added src/dolphin/os/OSAlloc.c implementing heap list helpers DLAddFront, DLExtract, DLInsert, OSAllocFromHeap, OSFreeToHeap, and OSSetCurrentHeap.

Deleted asm/dolphin/os/OSArena.s and added src/dolphin/os/OSArena.c implementing __OSArenaHi, __OSArenaLo, OSGetArenaHi, OSGetArenaLo, OSSetArenaHi, OSSetArenaLo, OSAllocFromArenaLo, and OSAllocFromArenaHi.
Added include/dolphin/os/OSAlloc.h with HeapCell, Heap, OSHeapHandle, allocator prototypes, and OSAlloc/OSFree macros.
Added include/dolphin/os/OSArena.h with arena getter/setter and arena allocation prototypes; the diff shows OSAllocFromArenaLo declared twice, likely intending one declaration for OSAllocFromArenaHi.
Added include/dolphin/os/OSTime.h and moved OSCalendarTime plus OSTicksToCalendarTime/OSGetTime declarations out of the umbrella os.h.
Changed include/dolphin/os/os.h into an umbrella include for OSAlloc.h, OSArena.h, and OSTime.h, and added OSRoundUp32B/OSRoundDown32B macros.
Updated src/melee/lb/lbtime.h to include dolphin/os/OSTime.h directly and remove duplicate externs.
Updated obj_files.mk to build src/dolphin/os/OSAlloc.o before the remaining asm/dolphin/os/OSAlloc.o and to replace asm/dolphin/os/OSArena.o with src/dolphin/os/OSArena.o.
Renamed assembly call targets: func_80344068 to OSSetCurrentHeap, func_803444E8 to OSAllocFromArenaLo, and func_80344514 to OSAllocFromArenaHi.
Inserted .4byte NULL padding in asm/dolphin/os/OSError.s sdata and asm/dolphin/os/OSInterrupt.s sbss, apparently to preserve small-data layout after moving OSArena globals into C.
smart_moves: Split OSAlloc conversion instead of forcing the entire file: matched C was added for the allocator subset while the existing OSAlloc assembly still supplies unmatched later functions such as OSInitAlloc.
Used build order in obj_files.mk to compose one logical Dolphin OS module from both new C and remaining assembly objects, reducing PR scope while advancing matching.
Introduced canonical Dolphin SDK-style names for previously anonymous functions and propagated those names into asm call comments, making later cross-file decomp work easier.
Added small helper functions for doubly linked list operations in OSAlloc.c, matching allocator behavior while making free/allocated list manipulation readable.
Used OSRoundUp32B and explicit ALIGNMENT/MINOBJSIZE constants to express allocator alignment and split-threshold behavior instead of burying magic assembly constants.
Used inline arena getter/setter wrappers in OSArena.c, likely as a matching tactic for the arena allocation functions while still keeping public non-inline accessors.
Accounted for data layout side effects by adding NULL words in neighboring asm small-data sections after moving __OSArenaLo/__OSArenaHi definitions from assembly to C.
decomp_lessons: Partial object replacement is a viable tactic: remove only the matched functions from an asm file and add a source object before the residual asm object in obj_files.mk.
When C replaces assembly that defined sdata/sbss symbols, verify neighboring small-data layout; padding may be necessary in unrelated asm files to keep labels stable.
For Dolphin OS code, prefer SDK-style headers per subsystem rather than keeping all declarations in a monolithic os.h.

Allocator decomp benefits from modeling heap cells as explicit structs with prev/next/size fields, because this makes list extraction, insertion, splitting, and coalescing map directly onto the assembly.
Arena low/high allocation matching can be expressed with ROUND/TRUNC alignment macros and explicit updates to __OSArenaLo/__OSArenaHi.
Call-site renames in still-asm files are useful documentation and help future reviewers connect matched source symbols to existing assembly branches.
Header hygiene matters after matching: lbtime.h switched to OSTime.h and dropped local extern declarations once the Dolphin OS time header existed.
naming_conventions: Allocator structs use SDK-like names HeapCell and Heap, with OSHeapHandle as an int typedef.
Arena state globals use Dolphin-style double-underscore names __OSArenaHi and __OSArenaLo.
Public Dolphin OS headers follow include/dolphin/os/OSAlloc.h, OSArena.h, OSTime.h, with os.h acting as an umbrella header.
Allocator convenience macros use OSAlloc(size) and OSFree(ptr) wrapping OSAllocFromHeap/OSFreeToHeap with __OSCurrHeap.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Kept unmatched OSAlloc assembly in asm/dolphin/os/OSAlloc.s while removing only matched functions from the start of the text section.
Added src/dolphin/os/OSAlloc.o before asm/dolphin/os/OSAlloc.o in TEXT_O_FILES so new C supplies earlier matched symbols and residual asm still contributes later symbols.
Replaced the entire OSArena assembly object with src/dolphin/os/OSArena.o after matching all listed arena functions and globals.
Used an extra unused parameter on DLInsert, noted in the source comment as needed to match OSFreeToHeap.
In OSFreeToHeap, the source manually inlined the DLExtract logic instead of calling DLExtract; the comment says the call was avoided, implying this was required for matching.
Used ROUND/TRUNC macros and inline arena accessors in OSArena.c to reproduce the assembly for OSAllocFromArenaLo and OSAllocFromArenaHi.
Inserted explicit .4byte NULL entries before lbl_804D5C18 and lbl_804D7378 to compensate for data-section movement.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or reviews were present in the provided PR slice.
Evidence is limited to the PR body and diff; no reviewer rationale was available.
follow_up_queries: Check later PRs for a correction to include/dolphin/os/OSArena.h where OSAllocFromArenaLo is declared twice and OSAllocFromArenaHi may be missing.
Look for follow-up PRs that match the remaining functions in asm/dolphin/os/OSAlloc.s, especially OSInitAlloc, OSCreateHeap, OSCheckHeap, and OSDestroyHeap if present.
Search for later cleanup of the commented-out extern volatile OSHeapHandle __OSCurrHeap in OSAlloc.h.
Search for additional small-data padding changes caused by moving Dolphin OS globals from asm to C.
Compare later Dolphin SDK header organization to see whether OSAlloc.h, OSArena.h, and OSTime.h prototypes were refined.
